item.name: Login Registered User With New Password

request.description: Requires a file: select a JPEG/PNG (< 2MB, <= 4096px) in the form-data 'file' field before running.
Requires a file: select any JPEG/PNG (the request must be a well-formed multipart upload; an empty form part gives a misleading status). USER role may not upload product images => 403.
Requires a file: select any non-image file (e.g. .txt, even renamed to .png). The backend decides by magic bytes, not filename or Content-Type.

item.name: Get Image for Nonexistent Item Not Found
Create Private Item for Image Tests
Upload Image to Private Item as Merchant

request.description: Requires a file: select a JPEG/PNG (< 2MB, <= 4096px) in the form-data 'file' field before running.

item.name: Get Private Item Image as Anonymous Not Found
Get Private Item Image as Owner Merchant
Get Deleted Item Image Not Found

exec: pm.test("Status is 404 (image removed with item)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(404));

item.name: Upload Image as Other Merchant Forbidden

exec: // Login the second merchant here: Access Control sets this token too, but that folder runs AFTER Inventory
body: { mode: "raw", raw: JSON.stringify({ username: "bigpanther", password: pm.collectionVariables.get("registrationPassword") }) }

request.description: Requires a file (any JPEG/PNG). Self-sufficient: the pre-request script logs in the registered merchant (bigpanther, created by the Registration folder) and sets {{registeredMerchantToken}}. A merchant must not upload images to another merchant's item (public item => 403, not 404).

item.name: Get Private Item as Anonymous Not Found

exec: pm.test("Private item is hidden from anonymous (404)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(404));

item.name: List Items as Anonymous Excludes Private

exec: pm.test("Private item not in public list", () => pm.expect(ids).to.not.include(pm.collectionVariables.get("privateItemId")));
pm.test("Public item is in public list", () => pm.expect(ids).to.include(pm.collectionVariables.get("publicItemId")));
pm.test("USER is forbidden from creating items (403)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test("ADMIN is forbidden from creating items (403) - RBAC is role-specific", () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

item.name: Update Public Item as Other Merchant Forbidden

exec: pm.test("Non-owner merchant cannot edit a visible (public) item (403)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test("Owner can update own item (200)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("Owner can delete own item (204)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));

item.name: Create Private Item as Merchant for Review Tests
Create Review on Private Item as User Not Found

exec: pm.test("Cannot review a private item the caller can't see (404)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(404));

item.name: List Private Item Reviews as Anonymous Not Found

exec: pm.test("Reviews of a private item are hidden from anonymous (404)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(404));

item.name: List Private Item Reviews as Other Merchant Not Found

exec: pm.test("Reviews of another merchant's private item are hidden (404)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(404));

item.name: List Own Private Item Reviews as Merchant

exec: pm.test("Owner can list reviews of own private item (200) - confirms gating, not blanket block", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.name: Delete Private Item as Merchant for Review Tests

exec: pm.test("Cleanup: owner deletes the review-test item (204)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("Author can update own review (200)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.name: Update Review as Other User Forbidden

exec: pm.test("A non-author user cannot edit another's review (403)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test("Merchants cannot edit reviews (403) - endpoint is USER/ADMIN only", () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test("Admin can moderate any review (200)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.name: Delete Review as Other User Forbidden

exec: pm.test("A non-author user cannot delete another's review (403)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test("Author can delete own review (204)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("Updating a deleted/nonexistent review returns 404", () => pm.response.to.have.status(404));
